Redefining Menstrual Care

Your period.
Your freedom.
Redefined.

Naree is a thoughtfully designed menstrual product that combines the comfort of pads, the mobility of tampons, the sustainability of menstrual cups — and the freedom you deserve, every single day.

Discover Naree Why It Matters
The Challenge

Why existing products fall short

Menstruation is a natural biological process experienced by millions every month. Yet despite decades of product innovation, managing periods comfortably remains a real challenge. Current solutions each have meaningful limitations — and no single product addresses all of them.

Women today are students, professionals, athletes, and leaders. They cannot — and should not — pause their lives because of their menstrual cycle. The need for a better solution has never been more clear.

Sanitary Pads

Prolonged moisture contact causes irritation and rashes. Most contain plastic, contributing heavily to environmental waste.

Tampons

Must be changed frequently. Improper use can lead to serious health risks including toxic shock syndrome.

Menstrual Cups

Difficult suction mechanism is intimidating for many first-time users, limiting accessibility and adoption.

Period Panties

Concerns about absorbent capacity and leakage often make these a backup option rather than a primary solution.

The Naree Device
Silicone ring · Plant-based cellulose core
The Solution

Introducing Naree

Naree is not an entirely new concept — it is a thoughtful reincarnation and amalgamation of existing menstrual hygiene solutions, engineered to bring together their strengths while eliminating their limitations.

At its heart is a medical-grade silicone outer ring that gently rests behind the pubic bone, pressing lightly against the vaginal walls to stay securely in place — without suction, without discomfort. At the center sits a plant-based cellulose absorbent core made from compressed bamboo cellulose fibers.

✓
Silicone ring reusable for 5–8 years
✓
Absorbent core replaceable after each use
✓
No suction mechanism — comfortable from day one
✓
Full freedom of movement for active lifestyles
✓
Dramatically reduced environmental waste
✓
Inclusive design for all menstruating individuals
Simple & Intuitive

How to Use Naree

01
Prepare & Wash

Take the Naree silicone ring from the jute pouch and wash your hands thoroughly before use.

02
Gently Insert

Gently insert Naree inside your vagina. The cotton lining is already placed in the mold — no extra steps needed.

03
Pull Out Gently

After use, pull it out easily using the pull-out ring — designed for a comfortable and effortless removal.

04
Clean & Reuse

Dispose or flush the used cotton lining, wash the silicone ring, insert a fresh lining, and it's ready to reuse.

Prepare  →  Insert  →  Remove  →  Reuse
Designed For

Naree is for everyone who menstruates

🎓
Students

Young women aged 15–24 who are open to sustainable, innovative menstrual care and want to stay focused through exam season and beyond.

💼
Working Women

Professionals aged 25–40 managing busy schedules who need reliable, all-day comfort without interruptions.

🏃
Athletes & Active Individuals

Sportswomen and fitness enthusiasts who train and compete during their cycle and need full freedom of movement.

🌸
Transgender Community

Transgender individuals who menstruate deserve inclusive, practical, and comfortable menstrual care. Naree is designed for everyone.

🌿
Eco-Conscious Consumers

Those seeking sustainable alternatives to plastic-heavy disposable products, without compromising on comfort or performance.

"Menstruation should never slow anyone down. Not ambition. Not performance. Not life."

Naree was born from a simple belief: that every menstruating individual deserves comfort, dignity, and freedom — each and every day of their cycle.

What We Stand For

Our core values

💪
Comfort First

Naree is designed around the body's natural shape. The silicone ring gently rests behind the pubic bone without suction, without pressure — so you forget it's even there.

🌿
Truly Sustainable

The reusable silicone ring lasts 5–8 years. The replaceable core uses plant-based bamboo cellulose. Less plastic. Less waste. A better future for the planet.

🌸
Radically Inclusive

Naree is designed for women, sportswomen, and transgender individuals who menstruate. We believe menstrual care should be accessible, dignified, and welcoming for all.

Users are impressed by the comfort & simplicity

Most reviewers highlight how natural insertion feels and how the pull-ring makes removal effortless — even for first-time users.

✦ Easy insertion ✦ No leakage ✦ Eco-friendly ✦ Pain-free
Verified Early User
★★★★★

"I was skeptical at first — I've never been able to use a menstrual cup. But Naree is completely different. The pull ring made me feel in control throughout, and I forgot I was wearing it after the first hour. Honestly, this is the first time my period hasn't disrupted my yoga practice."

P
Poulami Chatterjee
Yoga instructor · Ballygunge, Kolkata
Beta Tester
★★★★★

"As a competitive swimmer, disposable products have always been a nightmare. Naree stayed completely secure during training — no anxiety, no interruptions. The bamboo core replacement is so quick, it takes less time than adjusting a swimsuit."

R
Rishika Bandyopadhyay
Competitive swimmer · Salt Lake, Kolkata
Early Adopter
★★★★★

"I have endometriosis and most products cause me additional pain. The Naree silicone ring sits so gently — no suction, no pressure. I felt comfortable from day one. I genuinely teared up because I've never had a pain-free first day before."

A
Aparajita Dasgupta
Healthcare worker · Tollygunge, Kolkata
Eco Advocate
★★★★★

First-Time User
★★★★ ★

We're Here to Help

Grievance Handling

At Naree, we are committed to ensuring every individual has a positive and comfortable experience. If you have any concerns, feedback, or complaints regarding our product or services, our dedicated grievance team is here to assist you promptly and respectfully.

All grievances are acknowledged within 48 hours and resolved within 7 working days. Your privacy and dignity are our priority throughout the process.

📧
Email Us
[email protected]
📞
Call Us
+91 9836076149
Our Grievance Process
1
Submit Your Grievance

Reach out via email or phone with your name, contact details, and a clear description of your concern.

2
Acknowledgement

We will acknowledge your grievance within 48 hours and assign a dedicated representative to your case.

3
Investigation & Review

Our team will carefully investigate your concern with full confidentiality and respect for your privacy.

4
Resolution

A fair resolution will be communicated within 7 working days. Your satisfaction is our commitment.

Breaking the silence.
One conversation at a time.

Menstruation affects hundreds of millions — yet it's still treated as taboo. Naree is here to change the conversation, raise awareness, and empower every individual to make informed choices about their menstrual health.
